annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Window drag handling: KWin script calls dragStarted/dragMoved/dragStopped; daemon returns snap geometry. Uses double for window rect (KWin QML) and int for cursor/modifiers.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Phase 3 drag protocol: daemon-authoritative begin. Returns a DragPolicy that the compositor plugin uses to decide streaming, keyboard grab, and immediate-float behavior. Replaces dragStarted as the canonical drag-begin entry point. Single source of truth — no effect-side cache to go stale after settings reloads.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Window identifier.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Virtual-screen-aware screen identifier at drag start.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Qt::MouseButtons flags.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: DragPolicy struct: {streamDragMoved, showOverlay, grabKeyboard, captureGeometry, immediateFloatOnStart, screenId, bypassReason}.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Phase 3 drag protocol: hot-path cursor update. Replaces dragMoved. Fire-and-forget; throttled ~30Hz by the plugin. For snap-path drags the daemon runs overlay/zone detection; for bypass drags it watches for cursor crossing a virtual-screen boundary and emits dragPolicyChanged when the policy flips (autotile↔snap).

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Phase 3 drag protocol: daemon-authoritative end. Returns a DragOutcome the plugin applies verbatim — no further decisions on the plugin side. Handles autotile float, snap, drag-out unsnap, snap assist, and cancelled-drag paths through a single dispatch. Replaces dragStopped as the canonical drag-end entry point.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Window identifier (must match the windowId from beginDrag).

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Qt::KeyboardModifiers at release.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Qt::MouseButtons at release.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: True if the drag was cancelled (Escape, external cancel). False for normal button release.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: DragOutcome struct: {action, windowId, targetScreenId, x, y, width, height, zoneId, skipAnimation, requestSnapAssist, emptyZones}.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Forward scroll delta to the zone selector during drag. Reserved for future use when KWin exposes pointer axis events to effects.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Vertical scroll delta in 1/8 degree units (positive=up, negative=down). Standard wheel tick is ±120.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Cancel the current snap operation (e.g. user pressed Escape).

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Called when a window is closed during or after a drag operation. Cleans up any drag state associated with this window.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Window ID that was closed.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Emitted when the zone geometry under the cursor changes during drag. KWin effect applies the geometry immediately for snap-on-hover behavior.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Window identifier.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Zone X position (pixels).

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Zone Y position (pixels).

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Zone width (pixels).

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Zone height (pixels).

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Emitted when the cursor leaves all zones during drag and the window was snapped. KWin effect applies pre-snap size immediately (restore-size-only at current position).

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Window identifier.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Pre-snap width (pixels).

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Pre-snap height (pixels).

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Phase 3 drag protocol: daemon detected a policy flip mid-drag (typically because the cursor crossed a virtual-screen boundary that changes autotile↔snap routing). Plugin reacts by applying the transition: entering/exiting autotile bypass, canceling snap overlay, calling handleDragToFloat, etc. Replaces the effect-side cross-VS flip loop that used a stale local cache.
